description: You are a Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetist (CRNA) configuring a procedural sedation monitoring station in OpenICE for an ambulatory surgery center. Per ASA guidelines for moderate sedation, configure the system to monitor oxygenation, ventilation, and hemodynamics by deploying three simulated device adapters: a 'Multiparameter Monitor', a 'Capnography' or CO2 device, and a 'Pulse Oximeter'. Verify that data flow and waveforms are active for all devices within the system. Write a formal protocol document to /home/ga/Desktop/sedation_monitoring_protocol.txt containing these five sections: 'Monitoring Requirements', 'Device Configuration', 'Pre-Procedure Checklist' (with at least 5 items), 'Alarm Thresholds', and 'Emergency Response'.
